project.title: FileCabinet
project.description: Local-first Windows desktop vault for retaining, cataloging, previewing, verifying, and recovering high-signal technical artifacts.

produces: docs/FileCabinet v1.4.2 — Help Menu and Same Source Batch Patch.md
consumes: User-selected files and folders for vault ingestion
Existing vault item files during rescan

datasets.name: FileCabinet catalog
datasets.description: Local JSON catalog containing vault metadata, artifact records, tags, categories, hashes, extracted text paths, thumbnail paths, activities, and UI preferences.

datasets.name: FileCabinet vault
datasets.description: Portable retained artifact storage containing items, thumbnails, extracted text, quarantine, and exports.

scripts.name: installer/build-installer.ps1
scripts.role: Publishes the self-contained Windows x64 build and creates the WiX MSI installer.

automation.deploy: Publish artifacts/installer/FileCabinet-1.4.2.0-win-x64.msi to the GitHub v1.4.2 release.
tasks: Build self-contained Windows x64 publish output
Include release notes from docs/FileCabinet v1.4.2 — Help Menu and Same Source Batch Patch.md

notes.release_name: FileCabinet v1.4.2 — Help Menu and Same Source Batch Patch
v1_4_2_highlights: Focused Help menu exposes the User Guide, preservation rationale, repair guide, hash rationale, and roadmap documents from the app title bar
Installed builds now include README.md and docs/*.md so Help links work outside the development checkout
Same Source Batch discovery uses cached scope membership instead of repeated catalog-wide row filtering, avoiding UI lockups on larger vaults
Settings remains available through existing buttons and a new title-bar Settings entry
Application, CLI, installer default, and manifest version updated to 1.4.2
not_in_scope: Destructive cleanup of orphan generated assets
design_boundaries: Repairable local vault state over cloud dependency
notes.last_verified: dotnet test FileCabinet.Tests/FileCabinet.Tests.vbproj --no-restore passed 71 tests on 2026-06-01; dotnet build FileCabinet.vbproj --no-restore -p:OutputPath=.verify-build\ -p:UseAppHost=false completed on 2026-06-01; installer/build-installer.ps1 -Version 1.4.2.0 completed on 2026-06-01
